_meta.resume_note: Pinned to the official 2025-2026 Barstow Community College catalog. The Biology AS-T requirements and totals are fully extracted from PDF page 126.

degrees.degree_title_seen: Associate of Science Degree for Transfer, Biology
degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 catalog requires PHYS 2A and PHYS 2B, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Listed in the official 2025-2026 catalog; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: PDF page 126, Life Sciences Cluster — Associate of Science Degree for Transfer, Biology

courses.title_seen: General Physics I: Mechanics of Solids and Fluids
General Physics II: Electricity and Magnetism

degrees.notes: The 2025-2026 catalog prints 30 major units, 34 Cal-GETC units, 6 transferable-elective units, and a 60-unit degree total; overlap between major and GE explains why the printed subtotals are not additive. Compared with 2026-2027, this catalog uses MATH 4A rather than the later common-course-numbered MATH C2210.

notes: The official 2025-2026 catalog's Programs of Study section lists the Biology AS-T as the only general Biology associate award. Specialized and adjacent programs and all certificates were ignored, and out_of_scope_candidates remains empty by batch instruction.
